title: AGY-104: Agent-Human Collaboration Loops (L100)
author: tridorian Labs & Google Cloud
description: Constructing clear instructions, managing terminal execution approvals, and learning how to safely pause, redirect, and resume an agent task.

features.title: **Human-in-the-Loop Orchestration**
features.description: Learn to manage autonomous agent cycles with safety, balancing automation speed with human confirmation gates.

features.title: **Execution Approval Control**
features.description: Master the configurations behind manual task check-offs and high-autonomy --auto-approve container pipelines.

features.title: **Active Steering & Interrupts**
features.description: Acquire the tools and commands needed to pause, redirect, and safely resume agents during live execution loops.
